reasoning: Demeton-S-methyl is an organophosphorus insecticide with the structure S-[2-(ethylthio)ethyl] O,O-dimethyl phosphorothioate, containing a phosphorothioate ester group (P=O with one sulfur in the ester linkage), classifying it as a thiophosphate diester. It belongs to the organothiophosphorus class within organophosphorus compounds.
